title: Escape from Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #9 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The Imperial Down Defense Fleet has reported

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and "Buggy the clown," also a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Once thought of you as a brother!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And you knew Red Hair shanks !!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He had that kind of history...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Then why is he such a coward....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: You know a guy named Rayleigh, right?

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: key exchange.
